title: spartium linifolium
intro: Spartium linifolium, also known as French broom or Spanish broom, is a perennial leguminous shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been used to promote cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, among other health benefits. The leaves and flowers of Spartium linifolium can be made into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
